message:
fix(freeze): relooper codegen improvements for value ownership

- Use toBoolWithCtx for proper falsy handling in conditionals
- Add arg_shadow cleanup at function exit (matches zig_codegen_full)
- Handle get_var_ref opcodes properly (push to real stack, not vstack)
- Override return opcodes to properly dup return values and clean up

These changes ensure the relooper codegen has the same memory management
semantics as the full codegen, preventing use-after-free in complex
control flow scenarios.
